scripts.test: node --test oracle/*.test.mjs scripts/*.test.mjs && node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/mutation
scripts.nargo:check: wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "~/.nargo/bin/nargo --version | grep -q '1.0.0-beta.9' || ~/.nargo/bin/noirup -v 1.0.0-beta.9; cd /mnt/d/dorahack/stellar/zkinsure && ~/.nargo/bin/nargo check --program-dir circuits/claim"
scripts.nargo:test: wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "~/.nargo/bin/nargo --version | grep -q '1.0.0-beta.9' || ~/.nargo/bin/noirup -v 1.0.0-beta.9; cd /mnt/d/dorahack/stellar/zkinsure && ~/.nargo/bin/nargo test --program-dir circuits/claim"
